title: tilia breviradiata
intro: Tilia breviradiata, also known as the dwarf or shrub lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Tilia breviradiata include its calming and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of consuming Tilia breviradiata include reducing stress and anxiety levels, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Tilia breviradiata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
